title: Emporio Discount Column Failure — Root Cause
rootCause: GPT Pass C fails to populate discount_pct on Emporio meat rows because (1) Desc.(%) values are plain decimals without % symbol, visually indistinguishable from prices in a dense 4-number cluster, (2) Pass C table crop clips column headers so GPT lacks Desc.(%) label anchor, (3) prompt examples target Bocconcino-style explicit % suffix not Emporio format. Schema requires discount_pct key but allows null. Result: gross_unit_price and quantity extract reliably; discount_pct null; binder uses gross path.

patternByRow.prosciutto: discount null → gross unit → inflated total (qty×gross)
patternByRow.ventricina: discount bleed (17.5 as unit) OR gross path depending on run
patternByRow.deCecco: partial — line_total copied, discount effect implicit in total only

details.prompt: Emporio-specific negative example: Desc.(%) 17,50 without % → discount_pct 17.5; add positional rule for plain decimals between Preço Unit and Preço Total
details.geometry: Ensure Desc.(%) header visible in Pass C crop (verify top ≤ 430 for Emporio)
details.schema: Already strict; consider post-parse reject when gross+qty×gross≠line_total_net on discounted-layout rows

financialImpact.familyResidual: €1.40–€11 per affected row depending on run
